text:
June Lang
June Lang is the Chief Financial Officer at Duke Kunshan University, providing strategic, operational and financial leadership for DKU, as well as developing and overseeing the Finance and Procurement Offices to support DKU’s mission. As a member of DKU’s leadership team, she plays a significant role in planning for broad issues affecting the DKU community. She is also involved in matters related to the DKU Education Development Foundation.
Before joining DKU, June worked at Procter & Gamble, a global leader in the fast-moving consumer goods industry, where she served as Vice President of Finance. Through the 23 years, June led various finance teams across multiple markets, product categories (Fabric & Home Care, Hair Care, Skin Care & Cosmetics, Feminine Care) and disciplines (FP&A, market operation, supply chain and corporate function) to deliver excellent business results. She has rich experience in strategy development, business planning, financial analysis, budget management, governance and organizational development.
June received her bachelor’s degree from the School of Finance at Renmin University of China in 2001.
